de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class SolverTypeCollection

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SolverTypeCollection
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Iterable<SolverType>

    public class SolverTypeCollection
extends Object
implements Iterable<SolverType>
    Stores a set of solver types. This class can be used in order to encapsulate multiple solvers.

    • Constructor Detail

      • SolverTypeCollection

        public SolverTypeCollection(String name,
                    int minUsableSolvers,
                    SolverType type,
                    SolverType... types)
        Parameters:
        type - at least on solver type must be passed.
        types -
        minUsableSolvers - specifies how many solvers at leas must be usable, so that isUsable returns true.

      • SolverTypeCollection

        public SolverTypeCollection(String name,
                    int minUsableSolvers,
                    Collection<SolverType> types)
        Instantiates a new solver type collection.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the solver
        minUsableSolvers - the min number of usable solvers
        types - the types to add
